flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cleveland University-Kansas City rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.5k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 17 pp at Cleveland University-Kansas City vs the 2018–2022 baseline (33.3% vs 50.0%).

flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cleveland University-Kansas City rose 50% between 2021 and 2024 (66.7% → 100.0%).
